Comment: reference-class quadplane on a RealFlight custom model. The "px4" values are HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS.controls[] indices and MUST match PWM_MAIN_FUNC* in ROMFS/px4fmu_common/init.d-posix/airframes/1202_flightaxis_quadplane: controls[0..3]=lift motors 1-4 [0,1], [4]=forward/pusher motor [0,1], [5]=aileron left, [6]=aileron right, [7]=elevator, [8]=rudder (surfaces are [-1,1]).
AileronComment: The airframe declares split ailerons (CA_SV_CS0=left -> controls[5], CA_SV_CS1=right -> controls[6]); only the left one is mapped, because RealFlight models normally expect a single mixed aileron channel. If your RF model drives them independently, add a row for controls[6] on a spare rf slot.
OptionsComment: Do NOT add "Rev4Servos": it swaps rf0-3 with rf4-7 wholesale, and the rf indices below are already written out directly, so enabling it would double-swap.
RfModel: informational only - aircraft is selected inside RealFlight
